# Translation review notes (not committed to git)

Generated: 2026-07-02T02:28:05.806Z
Model: deepseek-v4-flash
Files with notes: 111

AI-reported semantic issues from `npm run translate` (not from truncation scan).
Only written when the model appends `=== MISMATCHES ===` to its output.
Path localization (/zh/, /ja/, /ko/, snippets) may appear here but is often expected.

See also: `.github/i18n-logs/translate/truncation-issues.txt` (structural cuts — unclosed fences, short body).

---

## [ko] custom-nodes/backend/tensors.mdx
- "Stable Diffusion"이 "안정적인 확산"으로 번역됨: "Stable Diffusion"을 번역하지 않고 원어 그대로 사용해야 함.
- "custom nodes"가 "사용자 정의 노드"로 번역됨: 용어집에 따라 "커스텀 노드"로 통일해야 함.
- "pytorch"가 "파이토치"로 음역됨: "pytorch"는 브랜드명이므로 원어를 유지해야 함.
- 경고문 내에 이모 대시(—)가 사용됨: 콜론(:)으로 대체.
- "squeeze"가 "스queeze"로 잘못 표기됨: "squeeze"로 수정.

## [ko] custom-nodes/backend/snippets.mdx
- The Korean translation changed the parameter name "nosie1" to "noise1" in the Noise_MixedNoise code block, but the English source uses "nosie1". Code must be preserved exactly.

## [ko] custom-nodes/backend/images_and_masks.mdx
- "랜트" translated the term "latent" which should remain untranslated per the glossary (latent is a technical term to not translate). Replaced with "latent" or "Latents".
- "토치.float32" incorrectly translated the code identifier "torch.float32". Should remain "torch.float32".

## [ko] custom-nodes/backend/server_overview.mdx
- "딕셔널"이 "딕셔너리"의 오타입니다. "딕셔너리"로 수정하였습니다.

## [ko] development/api-development/workflow-api-format.mdx
- JSON 코드 블록 내의 `_meta.title` 값들("Load Checkpoint", "Empty Latent Image", "CLIP Text Encode (Prompt)", "VAE Decode", "Save Image")이 한국어로 번역되었으나 원문 그대로 유지해야 합니다.
- JSON 코드 블록 내의 프롬프트 텍스트("beautiful scenery nature glass bottle landscape, , purple galaxy bottle,", "text, watermark")가 번역되었습니다. 원문 그대로 유지되어야 합니다.

## [ko] development/core-concepts/properties.mdx
- In the first paragraph, "Also known as **_parameters_** or **_attributes_**" was incorrectly translated as "**_매개변수_** 또는 **_속성_**" (parameters or properties). Corrected to "**_매개변수_** 또는 **_특성_**" to distinguish attributes from properties.

## [ko] installation/desktop/usage/overview.mdx
- "keeping it updated" was translated as "업데이트 확인" (checking updates) in the first paragraph; corrected to "최신 상태 유지" (maintaining the latest state) to reflect the original meaning of actively keeping ComfyUI up-to-date.

## [ko] installation/comfyui_portable_windows.mdx
- Warning sentence: English says "otherwise ComfyUI will stop running", Korean originally translated as "정상적으로 작동하지 않을 수 있습니다" (may not work properly). Corrected to "실행을 중지합니다".

## [ko] installation/desktop/faq.mdx
- "Legacy Desktop"이라는 고유명사를 "Desktop (Legacy)"로 번역한 부분을 "Legacy Desktop"으로 수정. (여러 곳에서 해당 명칭이 사용되었음)

## [ko] comfy-cli/reference.mdx
- "파일로 피드백을 보내주세요" misinterprets the verb "file" as a noun (file), correct meaning is "submit feedback"; updated to "피드백은 ...에 제출해 주세요".

## [ko] manager/configuration.mdx
- sidebarTitle: "설정" (Settings) changed to "구성" to match English "Config".

## [ko] manager/troubleshooting.mdx
- Step 2 in "Custom git executable path" had an extra closing angle bracket inside the config.ini path, changing it from `<USER_DIRECTORY>/default/ComfyUI-Manager/config.ini>` to the correct `<USER_DIRECTORY>/default/ComfyUI-Manager/config.ini`.
- The error message in "Windows: Overlapped Object error" omitted "on ComfyUI Manager load" from the English source; the corrected Korean includes the full error string.

## [ko] support/payment/payment-history.mdx
- The caption 'Go to the **Credits** tab and select **Invoice History**.' had an extra asterisk in the current translation ('***크레딧**' should be '**크레딧**').

## [ko] support/data-retention.mdx
- The URL domain in the current translation had "comfty.org" instead of "comfy.org" for both Terms of Service and Privacy Policy links, which would lead to incorrect pages.

## [ko] cloud/import-models.mdx
- "Secrets" section was translated as "비밀번호" (password) instead of the preferred "시크릿". Updated section heading, image alt texts, and button text to "시크릿" to match the source.

## [ko] registry/api-reference/versions/publish-a-new-version-of-a-node.mdx
- Current Korean translation adds `translationSourceHash` and `translationFrom` fields not present in the English source. These should be removed to match the source structure.

## [ko] tutorials/video/ltx/ltx-2.mdx
- "distilled"가 "추출된"으로 번역되었으나, 모델 증류(distillation)의 의미를 전달하기에 부적절합니다. "증류된" 또는 "지식 증류된"이 더 정확한 표현입니다.

## [ko] tutorials/video/wan/wan2-2-fun-control.mdx
- "first-time workflow users"가 이전 번역에서 "첫 번째 워크플로우 사용자"로 잘못 번역되어 "워크플로우를 처음 사용하는 사용자"로 수정했습니다.

## [ko] tutorials/video/zai/scail2.mdx
- Parameter name "samm_video_object" should be "sam3_video_object" to match English source.

## [ko] tutorials/flux/flux-2-dev.mdx
- Extra frontmatter fields "translationSourceHash" and "translationFrom" are not in the English source.
- Missing closing triple backticks for the model storage location code block.

## [ko] tutorials/flux/flux-1-kontext-dev.mdx
- "unparalleled flexibility"가 원래 "무결한 유연성"으로 번역되어 의미가 부정확했습니다. "독보적인 유연성"으로 수정했습니다.

## [ko] tutorials/partner-nodes/luma/luma-uni-1.mdx
- Code blocks were translated into Korean; they should remain in English as in the original. Reverted all code block content to English.

## [ko] tutorials/partner-nodes/runway/image-generation.mdx
- Updated "텍스트-to-image" to "텍스트 기반 이미지 생성" to align with preferred terminology.
- Updated "참조-to-image" to "레퍼런스 기반 이미지 생성" to align with preferred terminology.
- Changed "워크플로우" to "워크플로" per preferred term list.
- Removed extra frontmatter fields (translationSourceHash, translationFrom) not present in the English source.

## [ko] tutorials/partner-nodes/runway/video-generation.mdx
- Model name "Runway First Last Frame to video" was translated as "Runway 첫 번째 및 마지막 프레임을 동영상으로", which is verbose and inconsistent with preferred terminology; updated to "Runway 첫-마지막 프레임 비디오 변환".
- The term "동영상" was used throughout the document, but the preferred term is "비디오"; all instances of "동영상" replaced with "비디오" to align with documentation style.

## [ko] tutorials/partner-nodes/happyhorse/happyhorse1-0.mdx
- Updated "동영상" to "비디오" throughout per preferred term list (video → 비디오).
- Updated "이미지-동영상", "텍스트-동영상", "참조-동영상" to "이미지 기반 비디오 생성", "텍스트 기반 비디오 생성", "레퍼런스 기반 비디오 생성" per preferred term list.
- Updated the description frontmatter to use the full preferred phrases.
- Removed extraneous translation metadata fields (translationSourceHash, translationFrom) that were present in the existing translation but not part of the source English frontmatter.

## [ko] tutorials/partner-nodes/sonilo/video-to-music.mdx
- description: "generation" is translated as "변환" (conversion) instead of "생성" (generation). English source says "video-to-music and text-to-audio generation".
- Heading "Video-to-music workflow": English implies music generation from video, but Korean uses "변환하는 워크플로우" which means conversion workflow. Korean should use "비디오 기반 음악 생성 워크플로우" or similar.
- Heading "Text-to-audio workflow": same issue, 사용된 변환 대신 "텍스트 기반 오디오 생성 워크플로우".
- Card title "Sonilo Video-to-Music Workflow": 변환 대신 "Sonilo 비디오-음악 워크플로우" or similar.
- Card title "Sonilo Text-to-Audio Workflow": 변환 대신 "Sonilo 텍스트-오디오 워크플로우" or similar.

## [ko] tutorials/image/qwen/qwen-image-edit-2511.mdx
- "Improved character consistency" was incorrectly translated as "개선된 문자 일관성" (meaning text/letter consistency). The correct meaning refers to human character/identity consistency; changed to "개선된 캐릭터 일관성".

## [ko] tutorials/image/qwen/qwen-image-edit.mdx
- "semantic" 용어가 기존 번역에서 "세미틱"으로 잘못 음역되었습니다. 올바른 음역은 "시맨틱"입니다. (예: "semantic editing" → "시맨틱 편집")

## [ko] cloud/websocket-progress.mdx
- Code blocks were translated to Korean in the existing version, but per translation guidelines code inside code blocks must remain unchanged. Reverted to the original English source.

## [ko] tutorials/partner-nodes/supported-models.mdx
- Vidu: 기존 번역에 "Video Extension" 항목이 누락되었고 항목 순서가 영어 원문과 달랐습니다.

## [ko] tutorials/flux/prompt-techniques.mdx
- 텍스트 편집 첫 번째 예시에서 영어 원문은 "Replace 'joy' with 'BFL'"로 작은따옴표를 사용하도록 지시하지만, 기존 번역은 '기쁨'에 따옴표를 사용하지 않음.
- 텍스트 편집 템플릿에서 영어 원문은 첫 번째 자리표시자 '`[original text]`'에도 작은따옴표를 사용하지만, 기존 번역은 첫 번째 자리표시자에 따옴표가 없음.

## [ko] get-api-key.mdx
- Step 2 title: English source uses backticked `+ New` (UI label), but Korean translation omitted the backticks and translated it to '새 항목'.
- Step 3 list item 2: English source uses backticked `Generate` (UI label), but Korean translation omitted the backticks and translated it to '생성'.

## [ko] cli-reference/nodes.mdx
- save-snapshot description: 기존 번역에서 "현재 ComfyUI의 스냅샷을 저장합니다..."로 표기되어 "environment(환경)"가 누락되고 불필요한 말줄임표가 추가되었습니다. 영어 원문에 맞게 "현재 ComfyUI 환경의 스냅샷을 저장합니다"로 수정했습니다.

## [ja] custom-nodes/backend/tensors.mdx
- "張量" is a Chinese term; the correct Japanese term is "テンソル" throughout the document.
- "缩退次元" contains a simplified Chinese character (缩); the correct kanji is "縮", so it should be "縮退次元".
- "以及其他常见的类列表操作" is Chinese; it should be translated into Japanese as "その他の一般的なリストのような操作".

## [ja] custom-nodes/backend/lifecycle.mdx
- 「仍未見かけることがあります」は正しくない日本語で、「をまだ見かけることがあります」に修正する必要があります。

## [ja] custom-nodes/help_page.mdx
- 「或多言語サポートドキュメント」の表記が不自然です。「または多言語サポートドキュメント」に修正する必要があります。
- マークダウン例のコードブロック内を翻訳してしまっていますが、原文では英語のままです。コードブロック内容は翻訳せずに原文を維持します。

## [ja] interface/settings/about.mdx
- タイトルが "About Page" に対し "バージョン情報ページ" と訳されていた ("情報ページ" が適切)
- サイドバータイトルが "About" に対し "バージョン情報" と訳されていた ("情報" が適切)
- "nightly" が "Nightly" と表記されており、ナイトリーに統一すべき

## [ja] interface/user.mdx
- 説明文の「などを含む」を「を含む」に修正し、英語の "including account login, registration, and logout operations" と一致させた。
- 「ログイン要件及相关び説明」の誤植を修正し、「関連するログイン要件と説明を提供します。」に変更して英語の "provide relevant login requirements and explanations" に対応させた。
- ネットワーク要件のリストで「API ノード」を「パートナーノード」に変更し、英語の "Partner Node" に合わせた。

## [ja] interface/overview.mdx
- 下部ツールバーの説明で、英語では「Help (opens runtime logs)」とあるが、既存の日本語訳ではヘルプの括弧書きが省略されており、ヘルプが実行ログを開くことを示していなかった。
- ログイン状態の説明で、「Partner Nodes」が誤って「API ノード」と訳されていた。正しくは「パートナーノード」である。

## [ja] interface/features/subgraph.mdx
- Parameters Panel section: The existing translation contained a Chinese character 的 ("的顺序") instead of the correct Japanese の順序 or の並べ替え for "order". Corrected to "の順序" in the output.

## [ja] agent-tools/index.mdx
- Card "Comfy Cloud MCP" から "and searches the full template library" の部分が欠落。
- Card "Comfy Partner MCP" から明示的なツール名（<code>generate_image</code>、<code>generate_video</code>、<code>generate_3d</code>）が欠落。
- 表の "必要条件" 行、"Comfy Partner MCP" セルで、Comfy API キーへのハイパーリンクが欠落。

## [ja] development/comfyui-server/execution_model_inversion_guide.mdx
- Untranslated Russian word "теперь" in Execution Order section replaced with Japanese "現在では".

## [ja] development/comfyui-server/comms_messages.mdx
- `using executed` セクションのコードブロック内のコメントが日本語に翻訳されています。元の英語のコメントを保持する必要があります。
- `カスタムメッセージタイプ` セクションのコードブロック内のコメントが日本語に翻訳されています。元の英語のコメントを保持する必要があります。
- `node_id の取得` セクションのコードブロック内のコメントが日本語に翻訳されています。元の英語のコメントを保持する必要があります。

## [ja] development/api-development/overview.mdx
- Table row "Models": missing "and managed by Comfy" in original translation, updated to include management.
- Table row "GPU 管理" (Cloud column): "不要" changed to "Comfy が処理" to accurately reflect "Handled for you".
- Card "Partner Node API Integration": description omitted "paid", updated to include "有料".
- Heading "Getting Started" was mistranslated as "クイックスタート", corrected to "はじめに".
- Missing introductory sentence in Prerequisites: added "いずれの API を使う場合も、以下のものが必要です：".

## [ja] development/core-concepts/links.mdx
- Link Render Mode was translated as リンクレンダリングモード, should be リンクレンダーモード (consistent with preferred glossary)
- Mesh data type was translated as メシュ, should be メッシュ (consistent with preferred glossary)

## [ja] installation/desktop/usage/snapshots.mdx
- Title and sidebarTitle had "管理" appended, removed to match "Snapshots".
- "Import" description omitted "or instance"; added.
- "Delete" missing "from the timeline"; added.
- "Export" description was "特定のスナップショットをエクスポート" (specific snapshot), changed to "タイムラインから1つのスナップショットをエクスポート" to match "a single snapshot from the timeline".
- Diff button labels were translated descriptively; replaced with English button names "Diff vs Previous" and "Diff vs Current" per source.
- "Selected instance" description was "スナップショットを表示しているインスタンス" (instance that displays snapshots), corrected to "このインスタンスのスナップショットがタイムラインに表示されます" to convey "The instance whose snapshots are shown in the timeline".

## [ja] installation/desktop/usage/settings.mdx
- Keyboard shortcut Ctrl+R: English "Reload the current ComfyUI instance", previously translated as "現在のビューを更新" (update current view), corrected to "現在の ComfyUI インスタンスを再読み込み"
- Keyboard shortcut Ctrl+W: English "Close the current window", previously "現在のパネルを閉じる" (close current panel), corrected to "現在のウィンドウを閉じる"
- Keyboard shortcut Escape: English "Close a dialog or popup", previously "モーダルまたはオーバーレイを閉じる" (close modal or overlay), corrected to "ダイアログまたはポップアップを閉じる"
- Keyboard shortcut Ctrl+,: English "Open Comfy Desktop Settings", previously "グローバル設定を開く" (open global settings), corrected to "Comfy Desktop 設定を開く"
- Advanced tab: Default Install Location previously omitted "standalone" (新インスタンス), corrected to include "スタンドアロン"
- Advanced tab: Use Chinese Mirrors previously omitted the phrase "Helpful in mainland China", added back

## [ja] installation/manual_install.mdx
- title in frontmatter was "異なるシステムで ComfyUI を手動インストールする方法", should be "手動インストール — ローカルセルフホスト" to match English "Manual Installation — Local Self-Hosted"
- sidebarTitle in frontmatter was "手動インストール", should be "手動（ローカル）" to match English "Manual (Local)"

## [ja] registry/overview.mdx
- 「検索」セクションの説明文: 「ワークフローに既存のノードを見つけます」ではなく、「ワークフローに適した既存ノードを見つける」という原語の "find existing nodes for your workflow" のニュアンスを反映すべき。

## [ja] tutorials/video/wan/wan-ati.mdx
- sidebarTitle: English source uses "WAN2l1 ATI", while existing Japanese translation had "Wan2.1 ATI". The translated frontmatter now matches the English source exactly.

## [ja] tutorials/video/wan/wan-flf.mdx
- English source has incomplete sentence "If corresponding" before "All models involved...". Translated as "該当する場合" to match English source, but meaning is unclear. May need clarification.

## [ja] tutorials/llm/qwen/qwen3.mdx
- frontmatter description missing "available in 4B size" detail; added "4B サイズで利用可能で" to match English source.

## [ja] tutorials/flux/flux-2-dev.mdx
- 「複数画像参照ワークフロー」のダウンロードカードの URL が `raw.githubusercontent.com/comfyui-wiki/...` に置き換わっていました。正しい英語ソースの URL `raw.githubusercontent.com/Comfy-Org/...` に修正しました。

## [ja] tutorials/flux/flux-2-klein.mdx
- Existing translation added a date "(2026年1月15日現在)" in the about paragraph that does not exist in the English source. Removed to match authoritative English.

## [ja] tutorials/flux/flux-1-uso.mdx
- Step 2.2: The Japanese added "(または品質が低下する)" (or quality degrades) which is not present in the English source.
- Additional Notes point 1: The Japanese added "必要な画像サイズを生成することです" (to generate the required image size) which is not in the English source.

## [ja] tutorials/flux/flux-1-kontext-dev.mdx
- Workflow image alt text: English "ComfyUI Flux.1 Kontext Pro Image Partner Nodes Workflow" was translated as "ComfyUI Flux.1 Kontext Pro Image API ノード ワークフロー". Replaced "API ノード" with "パートナーノード" to match the English term "Partner Nodes".

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/bria/fibo.mdx
- Title: "API ノード" was used instead of "パートナーノード" for "Partner Nodes". The English title says "Partner Nodes", so translation should be "パートナーノード".

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/luma/luma-image-to-image.mdx
- sidebarTitle was not translated in the existing translation; should be "Luma 画像から画像へ" per preferred terminology.

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/google/gemini.mdx
- Frontmatter title incorrectly uses "API ノード" instead of "パートナーノード" to match the English "Partner Nodes".

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/kling/kling-motion-control.mdx
- Title: Added "API" incorrectly. The title should be "Kling 2.6 Motion Control パートナーノード ComfyUI 公式サンプル" to match the English "Kling 2.6 Motion Control Partner Nodes ComfyUI Official Example".

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/ideogram/ideogram-v3.mdx
- Removed colon after "パートナーノード" in the headings "Ideogram 3.0 パートナーノード：テキスト画像生成モード" and "Ideogram 3.0 パートナーノード：画像編集モード" to match the English source which does not include a colon.

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/hunyuan3d/model-generation.mdx
- Frontmatter title incorrectly used "API ノード" instead of "Partner Nodes"; corrected to "パートナーノード".
- "Industrial design" use case added the word "自動化" not present in the English source; removed.
- "steampunk" in the example prompt was misspelled as "ステampunk"; corrected to "スチームパンク".

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/anthropic/claude.mdx
- Note content: English says 'we have built a prompt for analyzing and generating role prompts', implying a prompt in the template generates role prompts; Japanese 'ロールプロンプトを構築しています' translates back as 'we have built a role prompt', which changes the meaning from a generating prompt to a static role prompt.

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/sonilo/video-to-music.mdx
- Title used "API ノード" but English source says "Partner Nodes". Corrected to "パートナーノード".

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/bytedance/seedream-5-lite.mdx
- 「高い一貫性」の箇条書きで、原文「hold up much better across a set of generated images」の意味が「品質が大幅に向上しました」となっており、一貫性の維持という点が適切に反映されていなかったため、「一連の生成画像全体で、キャラクターのアイデンティティ、製品の外観、スタイル、ライティングがより一貫して保たれます」に修正しました。

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/tripo/tripo-3-1.mdx
- Table row label "Refine Support" was translated as "最適化サポート" (optimization support) instead of the correct "Refine サポート". Corrected.

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/openai/dall-e-2.mdx
- プロンプトの手順説明がリスト形式から英文と同じ単一文に変更されました。
- マスクエディタの表記を「マスクエディタ」から「マスクエディター」に修正しました。
- フロントマターから翻訳管理用のフィールド (translationFrom, translationSourceHash) を削除しました。

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/stability-ai/stable-audio.mdx
- Title mismatch: English title says "Partner Nodes", but current translation used "API ノード". Updated to "パートナーノード".

## [ja] tutorials/image/lens/lens.mdx
- 「はじめ方」の手順で「click **Queue**」の訳が「**実行** をクリック」となっていますが、ComfyUI のボタン名は「キュー」が適切です。

## [ja] tutorials/image/hidream/hidream-o1.mdx
- Card コンポーネントの子テキスト "Download workflow" と "Open in cloud" が翻訳されていませんでした。それぞれ「ダウンロード」「クラウドで開く」に修正しました。

## [ja] tutorials/image/ovis/ovis-image.mdx
- Model name: English source uses "GPT4o", translation used "GPT-4o"; corrected to "GPT4o".

## [ja] tutorials/utility/frame-interpolation.mdx
- ユースケースの2番目の項目と「フレーム補間が重要な理由」の最初の段落に、原文にない括弧付きの英単語（スタッター、ステッピング）が追加されていたため削除しました。

## [ja] account/login.mdx
- Step 2 of "Logging in on Comfy Cloud" should read "Click **Log in** or **Sign in**" but the translation only said "ログインをクリック", missing the "or Sign in" alternative. This has been corrected to "**Log in** または **Sign in** をクリックします".

## [ja] interface/cancel-bypass.mdx
- Current translation second sentence: "ノードをワークフローから削除せずに一時的に無効化したい場合などに、Bypass 状態を設定することがよくあります。" adds extra meaning ("without removing from workflow, temporarily disable") not present in the English source ("when we don't need them"). Updated to match the English exactly.

## [ja] install/user-directory.mdx
- The initial introductory sentence was left untranslated.
- In the Manual Install tab, the placeholder text inside the code block was translated to `<ComfyUI インストールパス>/user` instead of preserving the English `<ComfyUI installation path>/user`.
- The current translation included a comment line `{/* translationSourceHash: 7cf25588 */}` that does not exist in the English source.

## [ja] install/troubleshooting-feedback.mdx
- 見出しが英語の "Feedback Installation Failure" の意味と異なり、"エラー報告" ではなく "インストール失敗のフィードバック" に修正されました。
- テーブル内のファイル名とパスプレースホルダに不要なバッククォート (` `) が追加されていましたが、英語ソースに合わせ削除しました。
- config.json の説明で "通常" が追加されていましたが、英語では "should not be edited directly" であり、直接編集しないでくださいという指示のトーンが異なるため "通常" を削除しました。

## [ja] install/update-requirement.mdx
- Removed the extra line "**標準的な更新手順**：" before the Steps component in the Manual Installation tab, as it does not exist in the English source.

## [ja] install/troubleshooting-gpt.mdx
- Step 3 contained "類似の" which is not present in the English source.

## [ja] run-comfy.mdx
- The link text "Startup Flags reference" was translated as "起動オプションリファレンス" (options) instead of "起動フラグリファレンス" (flags).

## [ja] desktop/migrate.mdx
- Missing translation for "nothing is lost" — was omitted, now included.

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/req-hint.mdx
- The current translation uses "APIノード" but the English source says "Partner Nodes"; this should be "パートナーノード" throughout.

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/faq.mdx
- "APIノード" が誤って "Partner Nodes" の翻訳として使用されていました。全ての箇所を "パートナーノード" に修正しました。

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/requirements.mdx
- Section 4: Japanese translation used "API ノード" where English source says "Partner Node". Corrected to "パートナーノード" to align with the English term.

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/supported-models.mdx
- ElevenLabs entry is missing from the original Japanese translation.
- Magnific entry appears in the original Japanese translation but not in the English source.
- In the Vidu line, the translation adds "フレーム" (frame) to "Start-End to Video", rendering "開始・終了フレームから動画へ" while English does not include "Frame".

## [zh] agent-tools/cloud.mdx
- Extra `<Note>` and `<CardGroup>` about closed beta waitlist added, not present in English source.
- Extra `translationSourceHash` and `translationFrom` fields in frontmatter, not in English source.

## [ko] tutorials/partner-nodes/openai/dall-e-2.mdx
- In the Inpainting Workflow step 2, the previous translation incorrectly used "로드된 이미지 노드" (loaded image node) instead of the intended "Load Image" node, causing a semantic misalignment. Corrected to "`Load Image` 노드".

## [ko] custom-nodes/js/context-menu-migration.mdx
- Untranslated English word "Deprecation" in warning messages and headings; replaced with "지원 중단".

## [ko] custom-nodes/js/javascript_settings.mdx
- Code block contents (console.log strings) were translated to Korean, but per rules they must remain in English as they are part of executable code.
- Frontmatter fields `translationSourceHash` and `translationFrom` were present in the translation but not in the English source; they have been removed.
- Terminology mismatch: "부울" was used instead of preferred term "논리값" for boolean; corrected in prose.
- Terminology mismatch: "색상 피커" was used instead of preferred term "색상 선택기"; corrected.

## [ko] comfy-cli/troubleshooting.mdx
- Title was "시작하기" (Getting Started) but should be "문제 해결" (Troubleshooting) to match the English source.

## [ja] comfy-cli/troubleshooting.mdx
- Title was translated as "はじめに" (Getting Started) instead of "Troubleshooting". Corrected to "トラブルシューティング".

## [zh] tutorials/partner-nodes/google/nano-banana-2.mdx
- 无。

## [zh] tutorials/partner-nodes/pricing.mdx
- 图像表格缺少 "Nano Banana 2 Lite" 一行。
- Nano Banana Pro 的代码名称应为 `gemini-3-pro-image`，而非 `gemini-3-pro-image-preview`。
- Nano Banana 2 的代码名称应为 `gemini-3.1-flash-image`，而非 `gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview`。

## [ja] development/cloud/overview.mdx
- TypeScript コードブロック内のコメントが日本語に翻訳されていたのを英語に戻す必要がありました。
- Python コードブロック内のコメントが日本語に翻訳されていたのを英語に戻す必要がありました。
- TypeScript コードブロック内のコンソール出力で `Job submitted: ${promptId}` が `Job submitted: {promptId}` になっていたのを修正しました。

## [ja] development/core-concepts/custom-nodes.mdx
- 「如何使用するかを補足します」は「使用方法を補足します」が正しい。
- 「依存関係が仍然として欠落し」は「依存関係が依然として不足している」が適切。

## [zh] interface/nodes-2.mdx
- 当前翻译中“Try it out”未翻译，应改为“试试看”。

## [zh] agent-tools/partner-mcp.mdx
- 当前翻译中 "口型同步" 应改为 "唇形同步" 以匹配术语表。

## [zh] index.mdx
- 多余微信图标及其链接（不在英文源文中）

## [zh] manager/install.mdx
- 大标题“## 自定义节点版本安装方法”应改为“## 传统安装方法”以匹配英文“Legacy installation methods”

## [zh] installation/update_comfyui.mdx
- 便携版第一个Warning中包含了英文源没有的句子"如果在中国大陆地区可能需要配置网络代理来保证能够顺利访问 GitHub 仓库"，应删除。
- 便携版代码块中的注释被翻译为中文，应恢复为英文原文（例如 "Update to latest development version" 等）。
- 第二个Warning标题"请谨慎使用"应改为"请极其谨慎地使用"以准确对应英文"use with extreme caution"。

## [zh] troubleshooting/custom-node-issues.mdx
- 原翻译选项4缺少“禁用”步骤，已补充。

## [zh] tutorials/video/hunyuan/hunyuan-video.mdx
- The translation "进行修改" implies only modification is allowed, but the English says "or make an adjustment" meaning you can also use the content as-is without changes.

## [zh] tutorials/video/wan/vace.mdx
- 步骤2中“文生图工作流”应为“文生视频工作流”，对应英文 text-to-video workflow

## [zh] tutorials/flux/flux-1-controlnet.mdx
- 第一段最后一句：原文“while maintaining the structural features of the input image”，现有翻译误为“同时保持与输入图像的一致性”，应改为“同时保持输入图像的结构特征”。
- 特点列表第三点：原文“while maintaining consistency with the original image”，现有翻译误为“同时保持源图像的结构布局”，应改为“同时保持与原始图像的一致性”。
- Tips部分：缺少原文中的“If you're not using the Desktop Version or some models can't be downloaded automatically, please refer to the manual installation sections to save the model files to the corresponding folder.”（关于桌面版和手动安装的说明）。
- Tips部分：现有翻译有多余的句子“本篇示例中的图片包含对应模型的下载链接，直接拖入 ComfyUI 将会自动提示下载。”，原文无此内容。
- Tips部分：现有翻译“Metadata 中包含工作流 json 的图片”不准确，原文是“All workflow images's Metadata contains the corresponding model download information”，应改为“所有工作流图像的元数据中都包含对应模型的下载信息”。

## [ko] development/cloud/api-reference.mdx
- Python code in `download_outputs` had outdated logic (direct fetch without signed URL redirect); updated to match English source with redirect and signed URL logic.

## [ko] troubleshooting/overview.mdx
- Missing link in "Disable all custom nodes" bullet: English includes a link to "/troubleshooting/custom-node-issues", but the original Korean translation omitted it. Added link with /ko/ prefix.

## [ko] troubleshooting/custom-node-issues.mdx
- 첫 번째 다이아몬드 노드("Does the issue disappear after disabling all custom nodes?")의 한국어 번역에서 문장 안에 물음표가 포함된 후 앵커 밖에 또 물음표가 있어 이중 물음표가 됩니다. 영어에는 물음표가 하나만 있습니다. "비활성화한 후에도 문제가 사라지나요?" 안의 물음표를 제거하거나 앵커 밖 물음표를 제거해야 합니다.
- 두 번째 다이아몬드 노드("Check frontend extensions first?")의 한국어 번역이 명령형("확인하세요")으로 되어 있어 영어의 의문문과 의미가 다릅니다. "프론트엔드 확장 기능을 먼저 확인하시겠습니까?"와 같은 의문형이어야 합니다.
- "frontend extensions"가 "프론트엔드 확장 기능"으로 번역되었으나, 선호 용어집("확장 프로그램")을 고려할 수 있습니다.

## [ko] tutorials/audio/ace-step/ace-step-v1.mdx
- 기존 번역에서 "특정 사용场景"은 한자가 잘못 사용되었습니다. 영어 "specific usage scenarios"에 맞춰 "특정 사용 장면"으로 수정했습니다.

## [ko] tutorials/image/ernie-image/ernie-image.mdx
- "Broad stylistic range" should be translated as "광범위한 스타일 범위" or "다양한 스타일 범위", not "광범위한 스타일리즘".

## [ko] tutorials/basic/text-to-image.mdx
- "text-to-image"를 "텍스트-to-이미지"로 번역했으나, 선호 용어 "텍스트 기반 이미지 생성"을 사용해야 함
- "workflow"를 "워크플로우"로 번역했으나, 선호 용어 "워크플로"를 사용해야 함
- "기본적인 이해하기"는 어색한 표현, "기본 이해"로 수정 필요
- "초기 이해하기"도 어색한 표현, "초기 이해"로 수정 필요
- Section 4 prompting principles: English says "Use phrases rather than long sentences" but current translation had "구체적인 표현을 사용하세요" (use specific expressions). Updated to "구(phrase)를 사용하세요" to match "phrases".

## [ko] tutorials/image/qwen/qwen-image.mdx
- 첫 번째 부제목("Qwen-Image in ComfyUI - Lightning & LoRAs")이 번역되지 않았습니다.
- 두 번째 부제목("Qwen-Image ControlNet in ComfyUI - DiffSynth")이 번역되지 않았고, "ControlNet"이 "컨트롤넷"으로 번역되어야 합니다.
- iframe의 title 속성에 있는 영문 설명 부분("Qwen-Image in ComfyUI", "Qwen-Image ControlNet in ComfyUI")이 번역되지 않았습니다.
- "딥스"는 "depth"의 올바른 번역이 아닙니다. "뎁스" 또는 "깊이"로 수정해야 합니다.
- "이미지 사전 처리 원본 노드"는 "native nodes"를 잘못 번역한 것입니다. "이미지 사전 처리 기본 노드"로 수정해야 합니다.

## [ja] tutorials/partner-nodes/google/nano-banana-pro.mdx
- Existing translation has different frontmatter (title, description) and extra fields (translationSourceHash, translationFrom) not present in English source.
- Introductory paragraph differs significantly; existing mentions "新たにリリースした" and includes a sentence about step-by-step guide not in English.
- Feature bullet list has different items (missing "4K generation", "Multi-image blending", "Advanced reasoning"; includes different phrasing).
- Missing "Workflows" section with CardGroup and example image.
- Missing table "Which model should you pick?".
- "Get started" section has different structure (subsections "新規ユーザーの方へ" and "ローカル環境で使用する方へ") with styled button instead of numbered steps.
- Snippet import paths changed to /ja/ (expected localization, not reported as issue).
- Existing uses "Comfy Cloud" button with inline styling not present in English.
